items.title: Bitcoin Holds Strong Above $74K Despite Minor Pullback
items.excerpt: Bitcoin trades at $74,485 with a modest 1.51% decline in 24 hours, maintaining resilience near all-time highs. Market analysts suggest the minor correction reflects healthy consolidation after recent gains.

items.title: Ethereum Faces 2.8% Drop as Price Settles at $2,280
items.excerpt: Ethereum experiences a 2.81% decline over 24 hours, trading at $2,280.47 amid broader market uncertainty. The pullback comes as investors await key network upgrades and institutional adoption news.

items.title: RaveDAO Token Crashes 77% in Dramatic Market Selloff
items.excerpt: RAVE token plummets to $0.54 following a devastating 77.54% drop in 24 hours. The sharp decline raises questions about the project's sustainability and governance token utility.

items.title: Aave Protocol Sees 6.5% Price Decline Despite DeFi Growth
items.excerpt: AAVE token drops 6.54% to $91.45 as the lending protocol continues expanding its ecosystem. The price movement contrasts with increasing total value locked across Aave markets.

items.title: Wojak Meme Coin Explodes 160% in Viral Trading Frenzy
items.excerpt: WOJAK token surges an incredible 160.20% in 24 hours, capturing retail investor attention. The meme coin rally demonstrates continued appetite for community-driven digital assets.

items.title: Asteroid Shiba Shows Stability with Minimal 0.1% Decline
items.excerpt: ASTEROID token demonstrates remarkable stability with only a 0.10% drop to $0.00030271. The minimal price movement suggests strong holder confidence in the space-themed project.
